prompt: Cinematic wide shot, extreme depth of field. A banquet table that stretches into an infinite dark void. In the foreground, one seat holds a mountain of decadent food, gold, and silk reaching the ceiling, glowing with warm light. Stretching into the distance, the table is perfectly empty, hundreds of silhouettes sitting in near-total darkness. The scale of the pile is gargantuan compared to the tiny figures. Moody, Caravaggio lighting, oil painting texture, 8k, somber atmosphere --ar 16:9 --no text, charts, labels.
insight: Illustrates the stark reality of extreme resource inequality, demonstrating how the immense abundance hoarded by a single individual exists in direct contrast to the profound deprivation of the masses
